active.title: Automate platform credential lifecycle
active.progress: PAST DEADLINE. Core infrastructure complete: credential-health-check.mjs, E prehook integration, circuit breaker extraction, DI injection, engage-blockers expansion. 27/30 clean E sessions before s1774. BUT s1774 had MoltCities credential failure (API key invalidated since s1735 — this is a regression that was known but not prioritized). The notes at s1773 anticipated needing extension to ~s1779.

deliverable_status.batch_registration: PARTIAL (6/8 platforms done s1735, MoltCities regressed, others unknown)

active.strategic_fit: HIGH. Credential failures reduced significantly. But the success criterion (30 consecutive clean E sessions) has not been met — s1774 MoltCities failure resets the counter. The auto-refresh deliverable remains unbuilt — without it, tokens will continue to expire and cause failures.
active.verdict: PAST DEADLINE, PARTIALLY MET. Core monitoring and early detection infrastructure is solid. But 2 of 4 deliverables remain incomplete (auto-refresh, backup/recovery), and the success metric (30 clean sessions) was not achieved. Recommend: close d072 as partially completed, define d073 successor focusing specifically on auto-refresh + MoltCities re-registration.

d071_coverage.note: Expected drift. circuit-breaker.mjs is newly extracted (R#310) without test — will need coverage in future B session. d071 is closed; coverage maintenance is organic.
